name: Undying Sun
descriptionTemplate: Recover 1 Arithmetica and gain [Arg1]% Temp. DMG Amplification. If Kathigu-Ra is in your team, draw 1 of her cards and apply 1 stack of {Fiamma} to it
lore:
Even if the false black sun has obscured the sky, the true sun will never extinguish.
The brief sunset at this moment is meant to burst forth a more blazing sun.
Now, the sun burning with amber flames rises again, never to set again.
